title: Aero: Above The Clouds
description: A simple, yet feature rich modpack server consisting of Create: Aeronautics at its core.
body: Sprawling factories. Airships crossing the horizon. A world remade by Terralith and Tectonic. Above The Clouds: Season 2 is a Create SMP built for people who want to engineer, explore, and share a world, without the server feeling like a mess.![Season 2 Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09685bfbf90ae856f0ca10f2f21eabffdae8e562.jpeg)![Build Contraptions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4af3b6dd8e4e6d07ebfa5497b02224ed5ed30ed.jpeg)![Be Industrious](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/575437a51694f19bac8a222a04b97bcc5fbf0d1c.jpeg)![Meticulously Decorate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d07cc503de3950b883dfd32142659d6140ca331.jpeg)
